description: Set up and track a US Treasury bond investment in the portfolio file located at /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/bond_portfolio.xml. Create a security named 'US Treasury 3.5% Nov 2028' with ISIN 'US91282CJL54' and a manual quote feed. Record a purchase of 10 shares at 985.00 each (Total: 9,850.00, Fees: 0) in the 'Bond Depot' using the 'Bond Account' dated 2024-01-15. Document two semi-annual interest payments of 175.00 each in the 'Bond Account' for the dates 2024-05-15 and 2024-11-15. Additionally, record manual historical prices for the security on 2024-01-15 (985.00), 2024-06-15 (992.50), and 2024-12-15 (997.50). Save all updates to the original portfolio file.
